session.user: Run prettier --check on these files and report results: - docs/learned/ci/ci-failure-summarization.md - docs/learned/erk/dispatch-ref-config.md - docs/learned/planning/session-preprocessing.md - docs/learned/planning/stacked-plan-branch-rebase.md
session.assistant: I'll run prettier --check on those files and report the results.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Check prettier formatting on specified markdown files

session.tool_result: Checking formatting... All matched files use Prettier code style!
session.assistant:
prettier passed: All 4 files use Prettier code style
